description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a spacious rooftop terrace, complete with outdoor seating, a dining area, and a shaded pergola. The exterior combines white plastered walls with horizontal wooden paneling on the lower level, creating a clean and contemporary look. Large, rectangular windows dominate the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is enclosed by a light-colored fence and includes a private swimming pool, a small patio area, and minimal landscaping with a single palm tree. The main entrance is marked by a decorative gate and a small tree near the front door. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rooftop terrace, large windows, wood paneling, a private pool, and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, decorative gate, large windows, rooftop terrace, and pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop dining area, pergola, and the length of the wooden paneling along the lower facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, rooftop structures, and the pool area with a palm tree in the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio seating, and the extensive use of glass and wood on the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
